Factorised GLMM model for Psychotic Risk prediction from SUbstance Use and other factors in CATSS

Silpa Soni Nallacheruvu

2026-04-16

Load the simulated Data

catss <- read_csv("catss_final_data.csv")
## Rows: 9261 Columns: 125
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr   (3): cmtwin, cmpair, batch
## dbl (122): SUD15_Cigarettes15, SUD15_Snuff15, SUD15_Alcohol15, SUD15_Cannabi...
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.

Check complete cases

print(paste("Number of complete cases:", sum(complete.cases(catss))))
## [1] "Number of complete cases: 4033"

Create the CCA dataset

catss <- catss[complete.cases(catss), ]

Split the data into training and testing dataset

Based on their twin_id

test_size <- 0.25

# Get unique IDs
unique_ids <- unique(catss$cmpair)

# Sample test IDs
n_test <- floor(length(unique_ids) * test_size)
test_ids <- sample(unique_ids, size = n_test)

# Split dataset
test_df <- catss[catss$cmpair %in% test_ids, ]
train_df <- catss[!catss$cmpair %in% test_ids, ]

# Print summary
cat(sprintf(
  "Train: %d rows (%d IDs), Test: %d rows (%d IDs)\n",
  nrow(train_df), length(unique(train_df$cmpair)),
  nrow(test_df), length(unique(test_df$cmpair))
))
## Train: 3011 rows (2018 IDs), Test: 1022 rows (672 IDs)

Prepare the data for the model formula by creating interaction terms and factor variables

# get a list of columns with their prefix
SUD15_vars <- grep("^SUD15", names(catss), value = TRUE)
SCZ15_vars <- grep("^SCZ15", names(catss), value = TRUE)
PRS_vars <- grep("^PRS", names(catss), value = TRUE)
ADHD9_vars <- grep("^ADHD9", names(catss), value = TRUE)
ASD9_vars <- grep("^ASD9", names(catss), value = TRUE)
ACE_vars <- grep("^ACE", names(catss), value = TRUE)
SES_vars <- grep("^SES", names(catss), value = TRUE)
PCA_vars <- grep("^PC", names(catss), value = TRUE)[1:2]
Sex_var <- grep("^SEX", names(catss), value = TRUE)
Batch_var <- grep("^batch", names(catss), value = TRUE)[1]

factor_terms <- paste(
  c(
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, ")")
  ),
  collapse = " + "
)


covariate_terms <- paste(
  c(SCZ15_vars, ADHD9_vars, ASD9_vars, ACE_vars, SES_vars, PRS_vars, Sex_var),
  collapse = " + "
)

# PCA terms according to the genetic batch
genetic_confounding_terms <- paste(
  c(
    paste0("factor(", Batch_var, ") : ", PCA_vars)
  ),
  collapse = " + "
)

# create interaction terms between SUD15 variables and all other covariates
factor_interaction_terms <- paste(
  c(
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", SCZ15_vars, ")"),
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", ADHD9_vars, ")"),
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", ASD9_vars, ")"),
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", ACE_vars, ")"),
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", SES_vars, ")"),
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", PRS_vars, ")"),
    paste0("factor(", SUD15_vars, "):(", Sex_var, ")")
  ),
  collapse = " + "
)

interaction_terms <- paste(
  c(
    paste0(SUD15_vars ,":", SCZ15_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", ADHD9_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", ASD9_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", ACE_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", SES_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", PRS_vars),
    paste0(SUD15_vars, ":", Sex_var)
  ),
  collapse = " + "
)

train_df$cmpair <- as.factor(train_df$cmpair)

Fit a GLMM Model

Fit a Positive GLMM Model

pos_glmm_formula_str <- paste(
  "SCZ18_Pos_Norm ~",
  factor_terms,  "+",
  covariate_terms, "+",
  factor_interaction_terms, "+",
  genetic_confounding_terms,  "+",
  "(1 | cmpair)"
)

pos_glmm_formula <- as.formula(pos_glmm_formula_str)

pos_glmm_model <- glmer(
  pos_glmm_formula,
  data = train_df
)
## Warning in glmer(pos_glmm_formula, data = train_df): calling glmer() with
## family=gaussian (identity link) as a shortcut to lmer() is deprecated; please
## call lmer() directly
## fixed-effect model matrix is rank deficient so dropping 57 columns / coefficients
summary(pos_glmm_model)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: SCZ18_Pos_Norm ~ factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Alcohol15) + factor(SUD15_Cannabis15) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15) + SCZ15_Spied15 + SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15 +  
##     SCZ15_Special_messages15 + SCZ15_Special_powers15 + SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15 +  
##     SCZ15_Read_others_minds15 + SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15 +  
##     SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 + SCZ15_Irritable15 + SCZ15_Unrealistic_abilities15 +  
##     SCZ15_Not_tired15 + SCZ15_Too_much_energy15 + SCZ15_Racing_thoughts15 +  
##     SCZ15_Talking_fast15 + SCZ15_Sexual_inappropriate15 + SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 +  
##     SCZ15_Hear_voices15 + SCZ15_headaches15 + SCZ15_worry15 +  
##     SCZ15_unhappy15 + SCZ15_lose_confidence15 + SCZ15_easily_scared15 +  
##     SCZ15_PROD_seen_hallucinations9 + ADHD9_fail_close_attention9 +  
##     ADHD9_difficulty_with_attention9 + ADHD9_not_listening9 +  
##     ADHD9_difficulty_following_instructions9 + ADHD9_difficulty_organizing_tasks9 +  
##     ADHD9_avoid_mental_effort_tasks9 + ADHD9_often_lose_things9 +  
##     ADHD9_easily_distracted9 + ADHD9_often_forgetful9 + ADHD9_difficulty_hold_still9 +  
##     ADHD9_often_move9 + ADHD9_often_run9 + ADHD9_difficulty_calm9 +  
##     ADHD9_often_motor9 + ADHD9_talk_excess9 + ADHD9_often_blurt_out9 +  
##     ADHD9_difficulty_waiting9 + ADHD9_often_interrupt9 + ADHD9_easily_bored9 +  
##     ASD9_delay_language9 + ASD9_difficulty_converse9 + ASD9_repeat_words9 +  
##     ASD9_difficulty_pretend_play9 + ASD9_talk_too_high_low9 +  
##     ASD9_difficulty_on_track9 + ASD9_difficulty_express9 + ASD9_difficulty_socialize9 +  
##     ASD9_uninterested_sharing9 + ASD9_own_terms9 + ASD9_difficulty_expect_behavior9 +  
##     ASD9_easily_influenced9 + ASD9_absorbed_own9 + ASD9_absorbed_problems9 +  
##     ASD9_strange_movements9 + ASD9_absorbed_details9 + ASD9_dislike_change9 +  
##     ACE15_bullied_often15 + ACE15_tease_bullying15 + ACE15_emotional_bullying15 +  
##     ACE15_rumours_bullying15 + ACE15_bullying_by_num15 + ACE15_bullying_time15 +  
##     ACE18_emotional_abuse18 + ACE18_witness_crime18 + ACE18_hate_crime18 +  
##     ACE15_other_bullying15 + ACE18_other_abuse18 + SES_birth_country_mother +  
##     SES_education_mother + SES_birth_country_father + SES_education_father +  
##     PRS_Amygdala_excitatory + PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory + PRS_CGE_interneuron +  
##     PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic + PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha +  
##     PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu + PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3 +  
##     PRS_Hippocampal_CA4 + PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus + PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier +  
##     PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron + PRS_MGE_interneuron + PRS_Miscellaneous +  
##     PRS_Thalamic_excitatory + PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph +  
##     PRS_all + SEX + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(SCZ15_Spied15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(SCZ15_Special_messages15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(SCZ15_Special_powers15) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(SCZ15_Read_others_minds15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(SCZ15_Irritable15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(SCZ15_Unrealistic_abilities15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(SCZ15_Not_tired15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(SCZ15_Too_much_energy15) + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(SCZ15_Racing_thoughts15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(SCZ15_Talking_fast15) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(SCZ15_Sexual_inappropriate15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(SCZ15_Rage_attacks15) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(SCZ15_Hear_voices15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(SCZ15_headaches15) + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(SCZ15_worry15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(SCZ15_unhappy15) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(SCZ15_lose_confidence15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(SCZ15_easily_scared15) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(SCZ15_PROD_seen_hallucinations9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(ADHD9_fail_close_attention9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(ADHD9_difficulty_with_attention9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(ADHD9_not_listening9) + factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(ADHD9_difficulty_following_instructions9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(ADHD9_difficulty_organizing_tasks9) +

##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(ADHD9_often_lose_things9) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(ADHD9_easily_distracted9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(ADHD9_often_forgetful9) + factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(ADHD9_difficulty_hold_still9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(ADHD9_often_move9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(ADHD9_often_run9) + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(ADHD9_difficulty_calm9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(ADHD9_often_motor9) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(ADHD9_talk_excess9) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(ADHD9_often_blurt_out9) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(ADHD9_difficulty_waiting9) +

##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(ASD9_talk_too_high_low9) +

##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(ASD9_difficulty_express9) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(ASD9_difficulty_socialize9) +

##     (1 | cmpair)

##

## PRS_Thalamic_excitatory                                                   0.0225616
## PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph                                           -0.0885675
## PRS_all                                                                   0.0109223
## SEX                                                                      -0.0187198
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)1:SCZ15_Spied15                                 0.0018162
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)2:SCZ15_Spied15                                 0.0590425
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)3:SCZ15_Spied15                                -0.0052268
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)4:SCZ15_Spied15                                -0.0278344
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)5:SCZ15_Spied15                                 0.0729484
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)1:SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15                       0.0010818

## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)2:PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier                    0.039
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)1:PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron               1.378
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)2:PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron              -0.890
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)3:PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron              -1.475
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)1:PRS_MGE_interneuron                            0.080
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)2:PRS_MGE_interneuron                           -0.503
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)3:PRS_MGE_interneuron                           -0.627
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)1:PRS_Miscellaneous                              1.168
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)2:PRS_Miscellaneous                              1.702
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)3:PRS_Miscellaneous                              1.109
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)5:PRS_Miscellaneous                              0.280
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)1:PRS_Thalamic_excitatory                            -0.194
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)3:PRS_Thalamic_excitatory                            -1.034
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)5:PRS_Thalamic_excitatory                             0.137
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)2:PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph                    1.246
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)3:PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph                    0.693
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)4:PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph                    1.464
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)1:PRS_all                                         -0.869
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)2:PRS_all                                          1.177
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)1:SEX                                           -0.254
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)2:SEX                                           -2.471
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)3:SEX                                           -1.791
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)5:SEX                                            0.045
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)1:SEX                                                -0.740
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)3:SEX                                                 0.823
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)5:SEX                                                -0.037
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)2:SEX                                               0.605
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)3:SEX                                               0.442
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)4:SEX                                               0.974
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)1:SEX                                              0.839
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)2:SEX                                              0.686
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)1:SEX                                   0.185
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)2:SEX                                   0.240
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)3:SEX                                   0.038
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)1:SEX                                           -0.553
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)2:SEX                                            0.228
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)3:SEX                                            0.602
## factor(batch)GSA1:PC1                                                     -0.157
## factor(batch)GSA3:PC1                                                      0.043
## factor(batch)PSYC:PC1                                                     -0.022
## factor(batch)GSA1:PC2                                                     -0.312
## factor(batch)GSA3:PC2                                                     -0.178
## factor(batch)PSYC:PC2                                                     -1.301
## 
## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 427 > 12.
## Use print(x, correlation=TRUE)  or
##     vcov(x)        if you need it
## fit warnings:
## fixed-effect model matrix is rank deficient so dropping 57 columns / coefficients

Compute p-values

pos_glmm_coefs <- summary(pos_glmm_model)$coefficients

pos_df_resid <- df.residual(pos_glmm_model)

pos_glmm_p_values <- 2 * (1 - pt(abs(pos_glmm_coefs[, "t value"]), df = pos_df_resid))

pos_glmm_coefs <- cbind(pos_glmm_coefs, p_value = pos_glmm_p_values)

pos_glmm_coefs <- as.data.frame(pos_glmm_coefs)

pos_glmm_coefs$significance <- cut(
  pos_glmm_coefs$p_value,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, Inf),
  labels = c("***", "**", "*", ".", "")
)

# Prepare clean table
pos_coefs_table <- pos_glmm_coefs %>%
  mutate(Variable = rownames(.)) %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05, Variable != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  select(Estimate, `Std. Error`, p_value, significance) %>%
  mutate(
    Estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
    `Std. Error` = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 3)
  )

kable(pos_coefs_table, format = "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Estimate Std. Error p_value significance
ACE18_emotional_abuse18 -0.039 0.004 0.00e+00 ***
SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 0.010 0.002 5.00e-07 ***
SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15 0.020 0.005 1.98e-05 ***
ACE18_witness_crime18 -0.024 0.007 3.64e-04 ***
SCZ15_Too_much_energy15 0.009 0.003 4.36e-04 ***
SCZ15_Read_others_minds15 0.008 0.003 2.67e-03 **
SES_birth_country_father -0.034 0.012 4.40e-03 **
SCZ15_headaches15 0.008 0.003 5.04e-03 **
factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)2:ADHD9_easily_bored9 0.294 0.107 5.91e-03 **
SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 0.011 0.004 6.43e-03 **
factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)1:ADHD9_often_run9 -0.079 0.031 1.02e-02
factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)3:SES_birth_country_father 0.043 0.017 1.08e-02
SCZ15_Talking_fast15 0.007 0.003 1.22e-02
factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)2:SEX -0.194 0.079 1.35e-02
factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)2:ADHD9_not_listening9 -0.058 0.024 1.63e-02
ACE15_emotional_bullying15 0.032 0.014 1.76e-02
factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)2 -0.645 0.278 2.06e-02
SCZ15_Spied15 0.007 0.003 2.06e-02
ADHD9_often_interrupt9 -0.013 0.006 2.57e-02
factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)4:ADHD9_not_listening9 -0.036 0.016 2.85e-02
factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)2:SES_education_mother 0.176 0.083 3.36e-02
factor(SUD15_Snuff15)2:SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 -0.211 0.101 3.72e-02
factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)2:ASD9_difficulty_on_track9 0.413 0.200 3.89e-02
factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)3:ASD9_delay_language9 0.079 0.039 4.17e-02
factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)4:SCZ15_lose_confidence15 0.019 0.009 4.31e-02
factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)3:SCZ15_headaches15 0.167 0.084 4.71e-02
ASD9_easily_influenced9 0.008 0.004 4.88e-02
factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)2:SES_birth_country_father 0.033 0.017 4.93e-02
factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)3:ASD9_dislike_change9 -0.088 0.045 4.98e-02

Check the twin random effect

pos_re <- ranef(pos_glmm_model)$cmpair[,1]
pos_qq <- qqnorm(pos_re, plot.it = FALSE)

plot(pos_qq$x, pos_qq$y,
     xlab = "Gaussian quantiles",
     ylab = "effects",
     main = "Random Effect of Twin ID in Positive GLMM Model")
abline(lm(pos_qq$y ~ pos_qq$x), col = "black")

Evaluate the model predictions

pos_glmm_y_pred <- predict(pos_glmm_model, newdata = test_df, allow.new.levels = TRUE, type = "response")
pos_y_true <- test_df$SCZ18_Pos_Norm


# Create dataframe
pos_glmm_df <- data.frame(
  actual = pos_y_true,
  predicted = pos_glmm_y_pred
)

# Residuals
pos_glmm_df$residuals <- pos_glmm_df$actual - pos_glmm_df$predicted

# Metrics
r2 <- cor(pos_glmm_df$actual, pos_glmm_df$predicted)^2
mae <- mean(abs(pos_glmm_df$actual - pos_glmm_df$predicted))
pearson_r <- cor(pos_glmm_df$actual, pos_glmm_df$predicted)
spearman_r <- cor(pos_glmm_df$actual, pos_glmm_df$predicted, method = "spearman")

metrics_text <- sprintf(
  "R² = %.4f\nMAE = %.4f\nSpearman rho = %.4f\nPearson R = %.4f",
  r2, mae, spearman_r, pearson_r
)

# predicted vs actual plot
p1 <- ggplot(pos_glmm_df, aes(x = actual, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#2C7FB8") +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = max(pos_glmm_df$actual) * 0.6,
           y = max(pos_glmm_df$predicted) * 0.1,   # move inside plot
           label = metrics_text,
           hjust = 0,
           size = 4) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +  # prevents clipping
  
  labs(
    title = "Positive Factorised GLMM Model - Predicted vs Actual (Test set)",
    x = "Actual Values",
    y = "Predicted Values"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 40, 10, 10))  # extra space

p1 
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# residual plot
p2 <- ggplot(pos_glmm_df, aes(x = predicted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#74A9CF") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Positive Factorised GLMM Model - Residual Plot (Test set)",
    x = "Predicted Values",
    y = "Residuals (Actual - Predicted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2

Fit a Negative GLMM Model

neg_glmm_formula_str <- paste(
  "SCZ18_Neg_Norm ~",
  factor_terms,  "+",
  covariate_terms, "+",
  factor_interaction_terms, "+",
  genetic_confounding_terms,  "+",
  "(1 | cmpair)"
)

neg_glmm_formula <- as.formula(neg_glmm_formula_str)

neg_glmm_model <- glmer(
  neg_glmm_formula,
  data = train_df
)
## Warning in glmer(neg_glmm_formula, data = train_df): calling glmer() with
## family=gaussian (identity link) as a shortcut to lmer() is deprecated; please
## call lmer() directly
## fixed-effect model matrix is rank deficient so dropping 57 columns / coefficients
summary(neg_glmm_model)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: SCZ18_Neg_Norm ~ factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Alcohol15) + factor(SUD15_Cannabis15) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15) + SCZ15_Spied15 + SCZ15_Others_Read_thoughts15 +  
##     SCZ15_Special_messages15 + SCZ15_Special_powers15 + SCZ15_Under_control_special_power15 +  
##     SCZ15_Read_others_minds15 + SCZ15_Seen_hallucinations15 +  
##     SCZ15_Extreme_excitement15 + SCZ15_Irritable15 + SCZ15_Unrealistic_abilities15 +  
##     SCZ15_Not_tired15 + SCZ15_Too_much_energy15 + SCZ15_Racing_thoughts15 +  
##     SCZ15_Talking_fast15 + SCZ15_Sexual_inappropriate15 + SCZ15_Rage_attacks15 +  
##     SCZ15_Hear_voices15 + SCZ15_headaches15 + SCZ15_worry15 +  
##     SCZ15_unhappy15 + SCZ15_lose_confidence15 + SCZ15_easily_scared15 +  
##     SCZ15_PROD_seen_hallucinations9 + ADHD9_fail_close_attention9 +  
##     ADHD9_difficulty_with_attention9 + ADHD9_not_listening9 +  
##     ADHD9_difficulty_following_instructions9 + ADHD9_difficulty_organizing_tasks9 +  
##     ADHD9_avoid_mental_effort_tasks9 + ADHD9_often_lose_things9 +  
##     ADHD9_easily_distracted9 + ADHD9_often_forgetful9 + ADHD9_difficulty_hold_still9 +  
##     ADHD9_often_move9 + ADHD9_often_run9 + ADHD9_difficulty_calm9 +  
##     ADHD9_often_motor9 + ADHD9_talk_excess9 + ADHD9_often_blurt_out9 +  
##     ADHD9_difficulty_waiting9 + ADHD9_often_interrupt9 + ADHD9_easily_bored9 +  
##     ASD9_delay_language9 + ASD9_difficulty_converse9 + ASD9_repeat_words9 +  
##     ASD9_difficulty_pretend_play9 + ASD9_talk_too_high_low9 +  
##     ASD9_difficulty_on_track9 + ASD9_difficulty_express9 + ASD9_difficulty_socialize9 +  
##     ASD9_uninterested_sharing9 + ASD9_own_terms9 + ASD9_difficulty_expect_behavior9 +  
##     ASD9_easily_influenced9 + ASD9_absorbed_own9 + ASD9_absorbed_problems9 +  
##     ASD9_strange_movements9 + ASD9_absorbed_details9 + ASD9_dislike_change9 +

##     ACE15_rumours_bullying15 + ACE15_bullying_by_num15 + ACE15_bullying_time15 +

##     SES_education_mother + SES_birth_country_father + SES_education_father +  
##     PRS_Amygdala_excitatory + PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory + PRS_CGE_interneuron +

##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(ASD9_difficulty_express9) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(ASD9_difficulty_socialize9) +

##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(ACE15_other_bullying15) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(ACE18_other_abuse18) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(SES_birth_country_mother) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(SES_education_mother) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(SES_birth_country_father) + factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(SES_education_father) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(SES_birth_country_mother) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(SES_education_mother) + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(PRS_Amygdala_excitatory) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(PRS_Cerebellar_inhibitory) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(PRS_CGE_interneuron) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(PRS_Deep_layer_corticothalamic) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(PRS_Deep_layer_intratelencepha) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(PRS_Eccentric_medium_spiny_neu) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(PRS_Hippocampal_CA1_3) + factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(PRS_Hippocampal_CA4) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(PRS_Hippocampal_dentate_gyrus) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(PRS_LAMP5_LHX6_and_Chandelier) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(PRS_Medium_spiny_neuron) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(PRS_MGE_interneuron) + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(PRS_Miscellaneous) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(PRS_Thalamic_excitatory) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(PRS_Upper_layer_intratelenceph) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(PRS_all) + factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15):(SEX) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Snuff15):(SEX) + factor(SUD15_Alcohol15):(SEX) +  
##     factor(SUD15_Cannabis15):(SEX) + factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15):(SEX) +  
##     factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15):(SEX) + factor(batch):PC1 + factor(batch):PC2 +  
##     (1 | cmpair)
##    Data: train_df
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -1502.3
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.3153 -0.5637 -0.0879  0.4558  3.9097 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  cmpair   (Intercept) 0.004523 0.06725 
##  Residual             0.018006 0.13418 
## Number of obs: 3011, groups:  cmpair, 2018
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                                            Estimate
## (Intercept)                                                               0.0016160
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)1                                              -0.1158066
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)2                                              -0.0620582
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)3                                               0.3504995
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)4                                               0.6883253
## factor(SUD15_Cigarettes15)5                                              -0.3805145
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)1                                                    0.0275861
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)2                                                   -2.0411993
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)3                                                    1.1720803
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)4                                                    0.2584926
## factor(SUD15_Snuff15)5                                                    5.3941114
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)2                                                  0.0140208
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)3                                                 -0.1302016
## factor(SUD15_Alcohol15)4                                                  0.0081323
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)1                                                -0.1311827
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)2                                                -0.2728025
## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)3                                                -2.4866169
## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)1                                     -0.0192446

## factor(SUD15_Cannabis15)2:SEX                                              1.025

## factor(SUD15_Painkillers_opioids15)2:SEX                                   2.983

## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)1:SEX                                           -0.919
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)2:SEX                                           -2.007
## factor(SUD15_OtherDrugs15)3:SEX                                           -0.327
## factor(batch)GSA1:PC1                                                      2.237
## factor(batch)GSA3:PC1                                                     -2.711
## factor(batch)PSYC:PC1                                                      0.591
## factor(batch)GSA1:PC2                                                     -0.436
## factor(batch)GSA3:PC2                                                      1.980
## factor(batch)PSYC:PC2                                                     -1.853
## 
## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 427 > 12.
## Use print(x, correlation=TRUE)  or
##     vcov(x)        if you need it
## fit warnings:
## fixed-effect model matrix is rank deficient so dropping 57 columns / coefficients

Compute p-values

neg_glmm_coefs <- summary(neg_glmm_model)$coefficients

neg_df_resid <- df.residual(neg_glmm_model)

neg_glmm_p_values <- 2 * (1 - pt(abs(neg_glmm_coefs[, "t value"]), df = neg_df_resid))

neg_glmm_coefs <- cbind(neg_glmm_coefs, p_value = neg_glmm_p_values)

neg_glmm_coefs <- as.data.frame(neg_glmm_coefs)

neg_glmm_coefs$significance <- cut(
  neg_glmm_coefs$p_value,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, Inf),
  labels = c("***", "**", "*", ".", "")
)


# Prepare clean table
neg_coefs_table <- neg_glmm_coefs %>%
  mutate(Variable = rownames(.)) %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05, Variable != "(Intercept)") %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  select(Estimate, `Std. Error`, p_value, significance) %>%
  mutate(
    Estimate = round(Estimate, 3),
    `Std. Error` = round(`Std. Error`, 3),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 3)
  )

kable(neg_coefs_table, format = "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"))
Estimate Std. Error p_value significance

Check the twin random effect

neg_re <- ranef(neg_glmm_model)$cmpair[,1]
neg_qq <- qqnorm(neg_re, plot.it = FALSE)

plot(neg_qq$x, neg_qq$y,
     xlab = "Gaussian quantiles",
     ylab = "effects",
     main = "Random Effect of Twin ID in Negative GLMM Model")
abline(lm(neg_qq$y ~ neg_qq$x), col = "black")

Evaluate the model predictions

neg_glmm_y_pred <- predict(neg_glmm_model, newdata = test_df, allow.new.levels = TRUE, type = "response")
neg_y_true <- test_df$SCZ18_Neg_Norm

# Create data frame
neg_glmm_df <- data.frame(
  actual = neg_y_true,
  predicted = neg_glmm_y_pred
)

# Residuals
neg_glmm_df$residuals <- neg_glmm_df$actual - neg_glmm_df$predicted

# Metrics
r2 <- cor(neg_glmm_df$actual, neg_glmm_df$predicted)^2
mae <- mean(abs(neg_glmm_df$actual - neg_glmm_df$predicted))
pearson_r <- cor(neg_glmm_df$actual, neg_glmm_df$predicted)
spearman_r <- cor(neg_glmm_df$actual, neg_glmm_df$predicted, method = "spearman")

metrics_text <- sprintf(
  "R² = %.4f\nMAE = %.4f\nSpearman rho = %.4f\nPearson R = %.4f",
  r2, mae, spearman_r, pearson_r
)

# predicted vs actual plot
p1 <- ggplot(neg_glmm_df, aes(x = actual, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#2C7FB8") +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = max(neg_glmm_df$actual) * 0.6,
           y = max(neg_glmm_df$predicted) * 0.1,   # move inside plot
           label = metrics_text,
           hjust = 0,
           size = 4) +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +  # prevents clipping
  
  labs(
    title = "Negative Factorised GLMM Model - Predicted vs Actual (Test set)",
    x = "Actual Values",
    y = "Predicted Values"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 40, 10, 10))  # extra space

p1
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# residual plot
p2 <- ggplot(neg_glmm_df, aes(x = predicted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#74A9CF") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Negative Factorised GLMM Model - Residual Plot (Test set)",
    x = "Predicted Values",
    y = "Residuals (Actual - Predicted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2
